title: alchemilla vulgaris var. intermedia
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. intermedia, commonly known as lady's mantle, is a perennial herbaceous plant of the family Rosaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and astringent effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as digestive problems and skin irritations. The health benefits of lady's mantle include soothing menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Lady's mantle can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
